description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, likely 16th century, concerning shipping. One of the entries is headed "the ship of Ḥamza Rayyis arriving from Istanbul." Cf. T-S J1.41 + T-S NS 321.7m (PGPID 12751) and ENA 3730.2 (PGPID 39645) and ENA 2898.4 + ENA 2898.3 (PGPID 12533).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
